expect: L3+ rate in L-946..L-996 >= 15% (matching S441 CONFIRMED in L-895..L-945). If met, F-LEVEL1 RESOLVED.
actual: W2 (L-946..L-996): 52.9% L3+ (27/51), 96.4% of tagged. W3 (L-997..L-1111): 16.0% (16/100), 88.9% of tagged. Full range (L-895..L-1111): 21.8% (44/202), 93.6% of tagged. All windows above 15% target. F-LEVEL1 RESOLVED.
diff: Expected >= 15% in W2: GOT 52.9% (3.5x target). All 3 windows above 15%. Declining trend (58.8 -> 52.9 -> 16.0) driven by tagging rate collapse (61% -> 55% -> 18%), not quality decline. Tagged lessons are 94% L3+ in all windows.
f_level1_verdict: CONFIRMED across 202 lessons in 3 windows. Conservative 21.8% exceeds 15% target. Mechanism: DOMEX level tagging + orient.py level-imbalance alert. Caveat: tagging rate declining. Successor: monitor tagging rate as health metric.
f_nk6_evidence: Dedicated resolution-intent session produced 1 global frontier closure (0.00/session at S452 falsification). Fourth mechanism needed: resolution-intent sessions alongside structural links, enforcement gates, historian routing.
selection_bias: DOMEX lanes tag levels; non-DOMEX sessions don't. 93.6% of tagged are L3+. Tagging rate declining: 61% -> 55% -> 18%. True L3+ bounded [21.8%, 93.6%].
